title.rendered: [Free Webinar] How to Maximize Your Nonprofit’s Donor Lifetime Value

content.rendered:
Date: Tuesday, May 16, 2023
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by:
Hannah Durbin, Web SEO Strategist at Classy.org
Keith Blazek, Customer Marketing Manager at Classy.org

Did you know that recurring donors are 9x more valuable than a one-time donor? Join this free webinar to learn the secrets of turning one-time donors into recurring donors and how to increase the value of each supporter.

We’ll also reveal where online donations over $5k are most likely to occur and what types of fundraising can result in $1,200 per donor over the course of a year.

Don’t miss this opportunity to unlock the potential of your donor base and maximize your organization’s impact!

<<Register Now>>

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, please register and you will be sent a link to the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Also, visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
